versions.version_description: Flawless pop-funk fusion from Diana and Nile here. Brilliant use of modulation. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Choruses play as intro. Outro plays as into repeating to fade over funk guitar figures.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
